headline: Wealthy consumers are turning to jewelry as an investment, especially colored gemstones
summary: Lofty gold prices and market volatility are pushing wealthy consumers toward jewelry, especially rare colored gemstones, as handbags lose appeal.

raw.headline: Wealthy consumers are turning to jewelry as an investment, especially colored gemstones
raw.summary: Lofty gold prices and market volatility are pushing wealthy consumers toward jewelry, especially rare colored gemstones, as handbags lose appeal.

headline: Investors are turning to luxury jewelry as gold prices hit records
summary: The luxury market is undergoing a subtle transformation as affluent buyers seek assets that offer both aesthetic appeal and tangible value. Fine jewelry featuring gold, silver and rare gemstones is increasingly seen as a hedge against inflation and currency volatility. Meanwhile, resale premiums for iconic handbags have declined from pandemic-era highs. Experts stress that jewelry investments can be less liquid and harder to price than traditional assets like stocks.
